title: [codex] cleanup stale one-off tooling
author: voodoohop
pr_body_excerpt:
- Removes broken MIDI log monitor tooling and its unused native MIDI dependency.
- Removes tracked one-off temp/manual artifacts for Polar webhook samples, database clearing, redirect auth testing, and Replicate migration testing.
- Updates the workspace lockfile to drop `easymidi` and its transitive native MIDI packages.

Validation:
- `npm install --package-lock-only --ignore-scripts`
- `npx biome check --write enter.pollinations.ai/package.json package-lock.json`
- `npm install --ignore-scripts`
- `npm run typecheck --workspace pollinations-enter`
- `npm run typecheck --workspace pollinations-gen`
- `git diff --check`

gist.headline: Sweeping up the MIDI dust
gist.blurb: We did some spring cleaning in the codebase, sweeping out old MIDI log monitors and stale testing artifacts. A tidier hive makes for happier bees!
gist.summary: Removed stale one-off tooling and testing artifacts, including broken MIDI log monitors and the unused easymidi dependency.
gist.impact: Developers will benefit from a cleaner repository and a lighter dependency tree without native MIDI packages.
gist.visual_concept: The Nomnom creature eating old scripts and musical notes (representing the removed MIDI tools), while Polly the bee sweeps up with a tiny broom.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the round tan Nomnom creature happily eating old paper scripts and floating musical notes. Polly the bee mascot wears a tiny maid headband and sweeps the floor with a small broom. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley.
